pi_items.source: Verified from install_astroimagej.sh and setup_task.sh which download the real WASP-12b transit dataset from astro.louisville.edu.
Verified against export_result.sh and task instructions.
Verified against export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this CSV file.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real WASP-12b calibrated FITS data from the University of Louisville. A subset of up to 15 frames (every 10th frame) is extracted during setup to span a range of airmass values. The target star coordinates and ground truth extinction coefficient are dynamically calculated at runtime by an internal script, which selects a bright, unsaturated comparison star and performs linear regression of instrumental magnitude against AIRMASS extracted from the FITS headers. The verifier checks for a photometry CSV and an extinction_report.txt, scoring the reported coefficient against the dynamic ground truth with a tolerance of 0.05.
